Risk Description: Failure to discharge planning and listed building conditions
Result: Design team and contractor to collate initial pack of information for discharge of conditions

Risk Description: Planning conditions impact on budget
Mitigating Action: Increase project budget
Result: Extent of conditions known and to be reviewed and managed

Risk Description: Electricity provider works delayed or non-conforming
Mitigating Action: Works to provide new supply are delayed / not in accordance with the programme to save having to provide a sub-station.
Result: Orders for the electrical services have been placed by CYC direct

Risk Description: Building Control Sign Off delay due to lack of resources
Mitigating Action: Revisit design to address concerns of building control
Result: Continue liaison with the Building Control Officer

Risk Description: Impact of boat companies (City Cruises)
Mitigating Action: Impact delivery/ site servicing strategy.
Result: Legal agreements are in place

Risk Description: Party wall negotiations & construction access
Mitigating Action: Objection from neighbours. Potential delay to programme
Result: Appoint party wall surveyor and progress discussions with neighbours

Risk Description: Failure to secure market interest for restaurant tenant
Mitigating Action: Restaurant not achieving appropriate tenant and long term revenue projections. Impact on project cost.
Result: Early engagement of agent for potential lettings. Sufficient expressions of interest

Risk Description: Increased construction costs
Mitigating Action: Exchange rate on materials. Impact of international markets following political decisions.
Result: Tender prices received and under review - Risk shall remain prominent where budget costs / provisional sums are included

Risk Description: Sub-contractor insolvency
Mitigating Action: Impacts Main Contractor
Result: Contractor financial checks and vetting of subcontractors

Risk Description: Surveys required to determine ground conditions/ contamination
Mitigating Action: Possible need to re-visit design / deal with contamination on site.
Result: GI survey undertaken, information obtained. Contamination results received. - Desk study provided by Arup

Risk Description: Identification of active movement
Mitigating Action: Proven to be active, remediation impacts cost
Result: Ongoing monitoring by ARUP and monitoring specification included within contract documents

Risk Description: Unidentified archaeology
Mitigating Action: Further evaluation required. Cost impact
Result: Evaluation of site undertaken

Risk Description: Additional surveys required
Mitigating Action: Cost impact
Result: Undertake outstanding surveys

Risk Description: Unrealistic programme submitted by contractor
Result: Market tested

Risk Description: Programme delays; due to flood levels impacting construction
Mitigating Action: Works stop, cost and programme implications
Result: Review historic flood data and issue to Contractor. Contingency plan to be developed

Risk Description: Delay to design programme
Mitigating Action: Client/ Contractor impact cost/programme
Result: Implementation of IRS schedules design deliverables and clear responsibility for design

Risk Description: Underpinning, piling and crack repairs to be considered
Mitigating Action: May resolve existing cracks and movement of the tower but other cracks may appear elsewhere that will require repairing.
Result: Detailed dilapidations surveys, crack monitors

Risk Description: Discovering structural unknowns
Mitigating Action: Costs of additional surveys and remediation works.
Result: Undertake surveys early to determine unknowns. Allow suitable contingency for remediation. Biggest concerns being the tower underpinning and South Range

Risk Description: Undetected services not identified on surveys and drawings
Mitigating Action: Programme/ re-design/ cost impact to address unknown
Result: Utilities surveys maps obtained and plotted on SGA drawings. Careful excavation / groundworks when on site

Risk Description: River source heat pump license approval by the Environment Agency; Refused
Mitigating Action: Delay in no approval from EA
Result: Provisional consent obtained; continued dialogue required

Risk Description: Sourcing stone for remediation works
Mitigating Action: Quarry that stone exists from is closed. Impacts programme, and different stone requires further approval from Historic England and the planning authority
Result: Investigate other quarries which supply the stone. Liaise with Historic England and the planning authority to have an alternative approved.

Risk Description: Structural damage and the repairs required to the tower
Mitigating Action: Finding the right solution to undertake the underpinning works
Result: Bullivants / Arup design and Vinci temporary works design to be reviewed in detail to mitigate any consequential delay. Building monitoring systems and locations to be agreed.

Risk Description: Outstanding defects remaining unresolved
Mitigating Action: CYC left with legacy issues and building defects which need resolving / impact on tenant occupation / satisfaction.
Result: Ability to resolve within the building contract. Use of retention

Risk Description: Costs exceeds allocated budget (Non Construction costs)
Mitigating Action: Particular risks surrounding consultant fees, furniture / fit out works etc.
Result: Review non construction costs prior to contract award and during construction

Risk Description: Incorrect estimation design errors and ambiguities
Mitigating Action: Construction cost overrun
Result: Risk sits with CYC except CDP items

Risk Description: Availability of specialist labour / equipment
Mitigating Action: Change in specification / need to  appoint specialists / commission bespoke works
Result: Dialogue with main contractor & supply chain

Risk Description: Poor co-ordination with design team interfaces (contractor design portions)
Result: CDP requirements have reduced from initial intent - Regular meetings to be held with Vinci and Design Team to discuss CDP interfaces.

Risk Description: Rights of Light
Result: Title report does not identify any issues

Risk Description: Poor contractor performance during construction
Result: Contract to be signed to protect client - performance bonds to be obtained.

Risk Description: Unknown South Range structures
Mitigating Action: Risk of discovering old basement causing issues with piling proposals

Risk Description: Insufficient design detail from specialist CDP packages
Mitigating Action: Impacts the sign off planning conditions  / listed building consents etc. in  particular pre-commencement  conditions
Result: Regular design reviews and interface management

Risk Description: Satisfying EA requirements
Mitigating Action: Incident occurring which stops the work  and action required to resolve the issue. EA Prohibition.
Result: Waste management and compliance with the EA to ensure no environmental hazards

Risk Description: Delay in design programme due to tenant/operator requirements
Mitigating Action: Operator changes impacting on cost / programme
Result: Recovery of cost / time included within the Agreements for Lease should late or significant changes be made

Risk Description: Design changes (including client changes/ variations / EOT & loss & expense claims) and unforeseen items
Mitigating Action: Construction cost overrun
Result: Traditional contract — risk with CYC; secure adequate contingency

Risk Description: Weather delays
Mitigating Action: Delay to programme - Wind, Temp, Rain
Result: Contractor to provide impact and allowances via contract

Risk Description: Underpinning/ crack repairs by third parties
Mitigating Action: Cracks may appear elsewhere. Remediation costs
Result: Detailed dilapidations surveys, crack monitors

Risk Description: Ground conditions - Borehole survey depth insufficient
Mitigating Action: Proposed piling designs impacted by this and require altering - Time & Cost impact
Result: Additional bore hole surveys indertaken, no foundatons / obstructions found albeit at relatively shallow depth. (near tower) Bullivants / Arup to review surveys and confirm they are happy with findings. Vinci to design piling to new structures and confirm site information held is adequate

Risk Description: Instability to boundary wall following demolition
Mitigating Action: Structural works required (piers)
Result: Assessment of wall structure required - Scope of works to be determined

Risk Description: Clashes between the existing building foundations and proposed drainage network. No information is available for the existing buildings therefore it has not been possible to co-ordinate the height of drainage to pass above/ under the existing foundation as required.
Mitigating Action: Co-ordination of drainage with foundations during construction. Cost impact.
Result: Trial holes could be undertaken to better understand the existing foundations. Drainage has been designed conservatively to allow for a level of contingency in the design if foundations impact drainage runs.

Risk Description: Potential drainage clash with proposed lift shaft pits
Mitigating Action: Additional external drainage network
Result: Trial hole dug in the location and appears to be clear - risk to be reviewed again once demoliton of north annex is complete.

Risk Description: Billing omissions or inaccuracies in BoQ
Mitigating Action: Missing information within the BoQ resulting in time and cost increases
Result: T&T have carried out reviews of the BoQ

Risk Description: Additional works not covered by contract documents. Arising from opening up works / scope and extent of works greater than assumed etc.
Mitigating Action: Cost & programme
Result: Detailed change management process to be followed.

Risk Description: Ongoing movement in the south range, given the removal of underpinning from the scheme
Mitigating Action: Underpinning works reinstated resulting in cost and time impact
Result: Monitoring during works

Risk Description: Design change due to level of development and coordination at the point of tender, for items such as North Annex chimney, retaining walls and stairs, and movement joints to existing structures
Mitigating Action: Impact on cost and programme - changes may delay construction activity / impact on sequencing resulting in EOT claims
Result: Coordination to be managed by design team as a priority - Design changes to retaining concrete wall has been instructed by CYC and should be underway by design team.

Risk Description: Council chamber cooling to be approved
Mitigating Action: Revisit of design proposals - time and cost
Result: Design team to coordinate with planning / conservation
